title: Nectarine Poached Light Elixir
description: A sour and crispy whole30-friendly light dish featuring poached nectarines that can be enjoyed as a dessert or snack.
instructions: Wash and slice the nectarines into bite-sized pieces.
Place sliced nectarines in a pot with half of the lemon juice and sprinkle with the honey over the top.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 5-7 minutes until tender but not mushy.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
